mapper.select: SELECT page_url, COUNT(*) AS visit_count, COUNT(DISTINCT ip_address) AS unique_visitor FROM website_access_log WHERE page_url IS NOT NULL AND page_url != '' GROUP BY page_url ORDER BY visit_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT referer, COUNT(*) AS visit_count FROM website_access_log WHERE access_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY referer ORDER BY visit_count DESC
